name: High-Fiber Bread Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 10-inch pie pan with bread slices.
2. Spread cottage cheese and onions over the bread.
3. In a blender, combine remaining ingredients except bacon bits.
4. Cover; blend until smooth.
5. Pour mixture over onion layer.
6. Sprinkle bacon bits on top.
7. Bake at 425°F for 35-40 minutes.
8. Cut into 8 wedges to serve. Per Serving: Calories--129.9, Carbohydrate--14.0 grams, Fat--2.7 grams.
